LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-13-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ARTIC SLOPE REGIONAL CORPORATION AND ASRC INDUSTRIAL SERVICES, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY JUDICIAL PROCEEDINGS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS ASRC INDUSTRIAL SERVICES, LLC'S (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS ASRC INDUSTRIAL SERVICES, LLC D.B.A. F.D. THOMAS, INC.) MOTION TO COMPEL AND STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Judicial Proceedings
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ARTIC SLOPE REGIONAL CORPORATION AND ASRC INDUSTRIAL SERVICES, LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Judicial Proceedings.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendants ASRC Industrial Services, LLC's (erroneously sued as ASRC Industrial Services, LLC d.b.a. F.D. Thomas, Inc.) motion to compel and stay proceedings pending arbitration is granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.) Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2020 Continued To Aug-19-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
